Animations

I’m using manim library for my animations.I’m still learning how to use this library which is quite hard because there is no documentations how to use it.You can watch different the examples which is made by Grant Sanderson under this Youtube link

Here some examples are done by me.

  • 5R Dynamic Equations

  • Recurrent Neural Network

  • pythagoras theorem
